skipped: _DOMAIN_TEMPLATES merge with apply_best_practice (responsibility separation per design)
YAML safe_load helper extraction (only 3 sites, would increase coupling)

test_results.note: The 2 failures are pre-existing failures in tests/test_generate_training_corpus.py documented in CLAUDE.md (unrelated to Issue #115).

summary: Applied all 6 simplify-review items. (1) _launch_eval_job now calls _resolve_active_config_path so chat/eval share the same config-resolution rule. (2) validate_generated_repo_id now also runs baseline_reporag.config.validate_repo_id, blocking traversal/metacharacter strings even when the YAML and Project string-match (added 2 regression tests). (3) Removed Issue #115 / DR / CB-001 reference comments where the WHY is captured by names; kept the substantive WHY comments (e.g. JP_INSTITUTIONAL_HINT conditional rationale, no-cross-profile gate). (4) detect_language Note shortened to 2 sentences while keeping the asymmetric-denominator rationale. (5) Wizard selectbox options now built as base list + list(_wizard._DOMAIN_TEMPLATES.keys()) so new templates auto-appear. (6) _run_query evicts stale pipeline_<name>_* entries on cache miss to avoid leaking pinned MLX weights when config_path swaps; cache-invalidation test extended to assert the eviction. ruff check + ruff format clean; 623 tests pass with the 2 pre-existing test_generate_training_corpus failures unchanged.
